I bought this handheld thinking I can play light weight games on the go as I have Xbox series X console where I play most of my games. The major problem with this handheld is that it doesn’t even handle light weight games and having windows OS spoils all the fun. If you truly want to have fun playing games on the handheld while on the go, I would suggest better you go for the one with highest config or any other brand which have better config compared to this hand held cost wise. Quality wise, I don’t have any complaints and build quality is too good and ergonomics are also good as well compared to other handhelds. When you hold it in your hand, you feel like holding a Xbox controller which is just awesome. With this config and performance, I am totally disappointed. I will post another review if I can hold on to it for some more days as I am already planning to sell it off as this handheld has totally let me down.Read more

5/5 — Meta Quest 3S Xbox Edition: Absolutely Worth It!I received my Meta Quest 3S Xbox Edition yesterday, and I can confidently say this is one of the best purchases I’ve made this year. The moment I put it on, I was completely blown away. The virtual reality experience is stunning—incredibly immersive, smooth, and far better than I expected. It honestly feels like stepping into another world.The spatial sound is fantastic and adds so much depth to the experience. You can literally feel where things are coming from. And the haptics? Amazing. They give every interaction that extra layer of realism that makes gameplay feel more alive.A huge plus was the bundle: I got 3 months of Xbox Game Pass Ultimate, along with the Horizon Plus subscription, which made the value even better. Having access to such a massive library of games right out of the box takes the whole experience to another level.Overall, the Meta Quest 3S Xbox Edition has exceeded my expectations in every way. If you’re on the fence—just get it. It’s totally worth it.Read more

This is a classic case of a product being mis-sold with reviews being clubbed with a Seagate expansion card to mislead customers. This is the same as any other hard-drive. The Xbox Series S/X works with any, I repeat "any" USB 3.0 HDD with more than 128GB in capacity.Even after buying you would not be able to directly install games of Xbox Series S/X and need to keep moving them back and forth to the onboard SSD. Disappointed.Disclaimer - I did not do my own research before buying this and am suffering the consequences. There are plenty of YouTube videos that show you how you can use any old HDD lying around at home so don't make the same mistake as me. Product is also non-refundable so boom, waste of money :( Oh well atleast now I have more space for my media and game streaming requirements ;)Read more

Low price, but hidden costs in terrible service.This is my third experience with Godrej, and unfortunately, it has been just as pathetic as the others. I initially chose them because of the lower price range, but I ended up losing that "savings" on service costs after the first year.The service center and third-party technicians are unprofessional:- Zero Punctuality: They never show up on time. You have to chase them for one or two weeks just to get a single visit.- Lack of Skill: The technicians are unprofessional and often lack even the basic knowledge required to fix the issue.- False Economy: While you might save ₹10k or ₹15k upfront, you will likely spend that exact amount (or more) on repairs and maintenance once the warranty ends.The Bottom Line: Save yourself the headache. It is better to pay more for a reliable brand upfront than to deal with the constant stress and technical incompetence of Godrej’s after-sales service.Read more

I recently purchased a new 1.5-ton air conditioning system for my 10x15 ft room, and I am thoroughly impressed! This AC is absolutely perfect for the room size, providing rapid and efficient cooling. Within a short time, my room transforms into a comfortable oasis, which is exactly what I needed.At its price point, I wholeheartedly believe this AC offers exceptional value for money. It strikes a fantastic balance, delivering powerful cooling without burdening you with unnecessary "smart" features that often inflate the cost and aren't truly essential for everyday use. For those seeking a budget-friendly option that doesn't compromise on core performance, this is an excellent choice.The installation process was surprisingly smooth and hassle-free, which is always a relief with new appliance purchases. However, it's crucial for prospective buyers to be aware of the installation costs. The base installation fee is ₹1500 + GST. Be prepared for additional charges for extra components that might be required, such as an outdoor unit stand, extra water drain pipes, or additional copper piping. These aren't included in the base installation, so factor them into your overall budget.Finally, while the company might claim the unit is stabilizer-free, I strongly recommend investing in a voltage stabilizer for added safety and to protect your new appliance in the long run. It's a small additional investment that can prevent potential issues.Overall, if you're looking for an efficient, no-frills, and budget-conscious air conditioning solution for a similar room size, I highly recommend this unit. It delivers on its promise of quick and effective cooling, making it a truly smart purchase.Read more
Installation charges is high 1650 in cityRead more

I’ve been using the Voltas 1.4 Ton 3 Star AC for the past 4 days, and I’m quite happy with its performance. It cools my 180 sq ft room within 15–20 minutes, which is pretty good. The Eco mode at 24°C is very useful and helps in reducing power consumption.The AC is not very noisy, which makes it comfortable for both sleeping and working. One small thing to keep in mind is that the horizontal swing (H-swing) has to be set manually — it doesn’t move on its own. I am trying to summarise this in few points:-1. This one is my 3rd AC in my apartment, and first from Daikin, that to from online platform (previous ones were from Hitachi). I shall suggest go for an window AC for its sheer longevity and ease of use and service. But if not possible then go for split unit and Daikin is a fair choice.2. This one is for my one of my kid's room of 105 sqft. The IDU and HDU is very sturdy for its price reference and relatively large in size and can be compared to an 1 ton AC.3. It's a non inverter AC thus, compressor doesn't work all the time and less fault prone without the PCB and electronics, still very energy efficient. It consumed ~4 units for 11 pm to 6 am operation yesterday. It cools the room within 10 minutes.4. Their Installation charges are quite steep but Daikin sent me a rate chart in advance. Technician Adil was efficient and humble and done a good job. Unlike other brands In Daikin the power goes to HDU first and a 4 core wire comes back to IDU. So please keep in mind that, this wire is completely chargeable over and above Installation charges.Read more

I am a loyal LG Customer and never faced any problem with their product. Their customer service has also been excellent throughout all these years. But this is the first time that I have faced an issue of manufacturing defect with LG AC. The AC was installed by the rookie technicians who did not check any leakage in the AC, perhaps assuming the brand reputation. Later, when I switched on the AC, it did not give any cooling. When I contacted customer care, the technicians visited and they checked that the gas had leaked. They checked the indoor and outdoor unit and even filled it with nitrogen gas to check for leakage. But as there was no leakage, they put new gas went away. Later, again the gas got leaked in three days. After that, today, again after raising the complaint, a specialist technician came and he saw that the cooling coil of the AC was damaged and the gas was leaking from that part. Earlier, all the technicians kept blaming our internal pipes at home for the leaks.This technician told me that these 2023 models are reporting this issue of cooling coil leakages since the last two months. Fortunately, the product is under warranty and it would be replaced free of cost, otherwise since LG has started outsourcing the manufacturing of their products to local manufacturers, there are problems in the products.In case you have also purchased any of the 2023 models, irrespective of features and weight, and you face a similar issue, tell the technician to check the cooling coil because these models are reporting this problem. I had to write this in review so that any buyer who is facing this issue would know the real issue behind the leakage.UPDATE - LG recommended replacement of the product due to multiple leakages and Amazon turned it into a nightmare for me. It is not giving me the complete installation charges and even telling me that it can pay a small share of it only as an Amazon Pay GiftCard. Please do not buy any electronic product from Amazon because they will make it a nightmare for you. Buy from the local dealer. I have complained against Amazon to the National Consumer Helpline (INGRAMS). If you are also a victim of Amazon's thuggery, then you can complaint and pursue the matter forward.Read more
